rationale: Medical/Clinical dashboard requiring extreme trust, clarity, and calm. Dark mode feels clinical/cold. Opted for an earthy, solid-surface approach to maximize data legibility and reduce visual fatigue.

components.input: bg-white border border-stone-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-stone-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:border-sky-500 transition-shadow
components.button_primary: bg-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-800 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white border border-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-50 text-stone-700 font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.badge_risk: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-orange-100 text-orange-800
components.badge_healthy: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-lime-100 text-lime-800
components.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-stone-800 hover:text-white transition-colors
components.sidebar_link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-md bg-stone-800 text-white font-medium
components.table_header: bg-stone-50 border-b border-stone-200 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3
components.table_cell: px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-stone-900 border-b border-stone-100

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons in duotone weight for a highly professional and refined look. Add 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to dependencies.

animations.chart_entrance: Use Recharts default animations but ensure they have an ease-out curve.

media.logo_icon: Use Phosphor 'Heartbeat' or 'Activity' icon for the main logo mark instead of a raster image to keep it crisp and scalable.

shap_chart.design: Use Terracotta (#EA580C) for positive values (pushing towards diabetes) and Moss Green (#65A30D) for negative values. No grid lines except a strong center zero-line.
shap_chart.tooltip: Custom tooltip with solid white bg and 1px border. Highlight exact SHAP value and feature name.

probability_gauge.type: Radial Bar Chart or heavily styled Progress Bar
probability_gauge.design: If risk > 50%, color is Terracotta (#EA580C). If risk <= 50%, color is Moss Green (#65A30D). Large centered text showing the percentage.

ai_explanation.layout: Card with pale amber background for the disclaimer banner at the top, followed by a clean, readable typographic layout for the Sonnet 4.5 text.
ai_explanation.disclaimer_text: This is an AI-generated explanation. This is not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural page layouts. Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, tables, dropdowns, and dialogs.
Do not use generic Inter font. Apply Manrope to headings and IBM Plex Sans to body text. Inject these via Google Fonts in index.html.
The dashboard layout must use 'CONTROL ROOM' grid pattern (tight gaps, high density, solid surfaces, no glassmorphism).
Ensure all cards have a 1px border of border-stone-200 and a subtle shadow-sm. No floating neon shadows.
Strictly adhere to the SHAP chart color scheme: Terracotta (#EA580C) for positive/danger contributions, Moss Green (#65A30D) for negative/safe contributions.
Forms must be modular: Group the 8 inputs logically into cards: Demographics (Age, BMI), Vitals (Blood Pressure, Skin Thickness), Lab Results (Pregnancies, Glucose, Insulin, Pedigree).
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all form inputs, buttons, and navigation links.
